name: cf-worker-ws-dev
description: A tunnel for the E_D_tunnel project to allow deployed applications to cloudflare pages and workers to be accessed via a custom domain.

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator index.js --output _worker.js --compact true --simplify true --split-strings true --split-strings-chunk-length 7 --identifier-names-generator mangled-shuffled --rename-globals true --transform-object-keys true --seed 1
